reviews.review_msg: She is clever and knowledgeable; SFU is a treasure to have her as an instructor!

Great professor. Definitely an asset to Beedie. Very knowledgeable in IHRM material (as he has published a good amount of it). Engaging class, valuable material, and easy to understand. Take a class with him if you can!
THE coolest professor I ever had.  Abu Dhabi!!
Majid does not have a very good course structure. Half the time, the class struggles to find what he exactly wants us to do. Course outline is tentative and is prone to changes.

Mila was fair, straight-forward, and realistic. She understood what it's like to be a student. Participation is important, but not really difficult..just say what's on your mind. Her exams were fair because she tells you ahead of time to focus on her slides. No real surprises...

BUS 346 and BUS 432.  She is a fair prof. Her lectures can be really boring sometimes but that's what you expect in IB and HR. Her exams are fair.  The workload for the assignments are acceptable but grammar do counts!  Make sure you go to her lectures and memorize all the slides.  Read the text.  And write as much as you can in exams.
Nice lady. Easy course, but too much extra reading of little benefit. Better off just summarizing into lecture notes.
